name: boolean field accepts 'on'
note: BE (respect v::boolType()) requires a native PHP bool and rejects the string "on". FE checkType('boolean') already accepts an enumerated set of boolean-like strings (true/false/1/0/on/off), so FE is_valid=true matches expected but BE returns false. Target = Coercion Contract v1 BooleanCoercion makes BE accept these strings too (resolved in W2).
